microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's resilience validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing deployment workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills across enterprise mission-critical customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility in constrained, high-stakes environments.

Built an **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured automation workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — operationalizing AI tooling in a secure, mission-critical infrastructure context.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows, running user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical operational workflow gaps and unmet automation needs.

Improved knowledge retrieval and data integrity by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% across internal engineering teams.

Identified **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch through discovery with 20+ service teams, then built a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths and reduce operational overhead at scale.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact infrastructure improvements.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining a legacy OS migration strategy and mapping system dependencies across 1,200+ stations in a constrained production environment.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to deploy **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual intervention in critical infrastructure workflows.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking cross-team execution under tight operational timelines.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a new CRM integration that standardized the full operational lifecycle.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search visibility to improve lead quality.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved leadership's financial decision-making.
